<p class="key-answer" data-question="Cetuximab 有什麼相關新聞？">

</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Cetuximab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Erbitux is indicated for the treatment of patients with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR)-expressing, RAS wild-type metastatic colorectal cancer:  in combination with irinotecan-based...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（100.0%）</li>
<li>bronchial adenomas/carcinoids childhood（100.0%）</li>
<li>chondroid hamartoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>non-seminomatous lesion（100.0%）</li>
<li>tumor of testis and paratestis（100.0%）</li>
<li>odontogenic cyst（100.0%）</li>
<li>thyroglossal duct cyst（100.0%）</li>
<li>epiglottis neoplasm（100.0%）</li>
<li>cystic neoplasm（100.0%）</li>
<li>pre-malignant neoplasm（100.0%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of tongue（100.0%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of hypopharynx（100.0%）</li>
<li>nasopharyngeal teratoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>mesenchymoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of floor of mouth（100.0%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>inner ear neoplasm（100.0%）</li>
<li>nasal cavity inverting papilloma（100.0%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of jugular foramen（100.0%）</li>
<li>epidural spinal canal neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
